title: Beta's Better Enchantments
description: Removes some repetitive enchantments and adds new function to old ones
body:
This is a small pack that aims to remove some repetitive enchantments (eg: flame, and fire aspect). I have included a small list of what enchantments were removed/repurposed below:

- Fire aspect
  - Fire Aspect now works on bows serving the same purpose as the flame enchantment
  - It also works on pickaxes making it smelt loot from mining
- Fortune
  - The looting enchantment has been removed and replaced with fortune
  - The same is for luck of the sea.
- Multishot
  - Multishot now works on bows
  - It is mutualy exclusive with Fire Aspect
- Knockback
  - Punch has been replaced with knockback
- Wind burst
  - Wind burst can now be put on bows and crossbows
- Thorns
  - Thorns can now be put on wolf armor and horse armor
- Frost walker
  - Frost walker can now also be put on wolf armor and horse armor
- Protection
  - Protection can be put on horse armor
- Smite
  - Smite does extra damage to arthropods
